final_response: Routed contractor access provisioning pattern (three instances: Feb, Mar, May) to observations.md. Pattern captures recurring first-week access delays for external contractors. No escalation triggered; user intent was tracking, accomplished. Daybook entry documents routing logic.

actions.summary: Created daybook entry documenting pattern routing decision
Added observation: contractor access provisioning lags first week of project (user-generated)

notes: Pattern treated as observation, not decision or followup — preserves without action commitment
User statement 'flag it so we don't lose track' routed to observations.md, which is the correct surface for cross-cutting patterns
Guardrails set in daybook to prevent fourth occurrence from being missed; suggests promotion to decision if pattern repeats
